Prize (best tool use): Internship at the EU Commission working on AI tools for the Acquis Management Programme, which uses AI to consolidate EU legislation and detect gaps, overlaps, and contradictions across EU law.
What is unlocked: The Cellar API, the data access interface for the EU's central repository of official publications, legal texts, and metadata. Includes the Cellar API interfaces (RSS, content and notices) and the Cellar SPARQL endpoint.

Prize (best tool use): $1,000 credits for Neo4j Aura cloud hosting.
What is unlocked: Neo4j, a graph database and graph intelligence platform. Two ways in: (a) Neo4j AuraDB for a cloud-hosted database, or (b) Neo4j Desktop for local development.
How much is unlocked: No restrictions on usage. The credits can be applied to any tier or size of instance, though higher/bigger will consume credits faster.

Prize (best tool use): $2K credits for the 1st place, $1.5K credits for the 2nd place, $1K credits for the 3rd place.
What is unlocked: Claude Code, an AI-powered coding assistant that helps users write, edit, and debug code, enabling rapid development of applications through natural language interaction.

Prize (best tool use): Day at Google: the winning team will get an opportunity to visit Google's Office in London and have lunch with the engineering team.
What is unlocked: Access to the full range of GCP services via temporary, pre-configured projects. This includes services for compute (Cloud Run, Google Kubernetes Engine, Compute Engine), data (BigQuery, AlloyDB, Cloud Storage), AI/ML (Vertex AI, Gemini APIs), web & mobile (Firebase), and many more.
How much is unlocked: No specific per-user credit limit. However, the usage is expected to adhere to Google Cloud's best practices as monitored by mentors. GCP Marketplace and 3rd party Models are not included.

Prize (best tool use): $2000 Momen credit for each participant in the winning team.
What is unlocked: Momen, a no-code, full-stack platform that lets non-technical users build and manage web applications for their businesses with full control and flexibility.
How much is unlocked: $100 in credits. Credits can be used to build and host MVPs, legal tools, AI agents or entrepreneurial web apps on Momen.

Prize (best tool use): The winners will receive 3 months of free access to Lovable Pro Plan 1.
What is unlocked: Lovable, an AI-powered development platform that lets users rapidly build, prototype, and deploy applications using natural language and integrated APIs.
How much is unlocked: Complimentary access to the Lovable Pro Plan 1, including 100 free Lovable credits (approximately $25 in value) per participant.

Prize (best tool use): 1x RTX 5080 for the team with the best / most innovative use of Nemotron models for the Untitled (https://app.notion.com/p/386c01c241b2808cb026cf612416c541?pvs=21)
How much is unlocked: Capped at 50 requests per day and 20 requests per minute.

What is unlocked: The Perplexity API platform: the Search API (real-time access to ranked web search results from a continuously refreshed index) and the Agent API (a multi-provider, interoperable API for building LLM applications, with access to models from multiple providers, integrated real-time web search, tool configuration, reasoning control, and token budgets).
How much is unlocked: No usage limit. If a participant runs out of credits, the on-site staff member will be able to assist.
